title: Aglaia kostermansii
intro: Aglaia kostermansii is a species of plant in the Meliaceae family, commonly known as a medicinal tree. The plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiabetic properties. Bioactive constituents of Aglaia kostermansii include flavonoids, terpenoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Aglaia kostermansii is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
